_comment: Maps canonical command basename to Gemini TOML description. Unlisted commands get first-sentence extraction.
mgr: Dispatch the Engineering Manager to orchestrate work
sys-eng: Dispatch the Senior Engineer for implementation work
sys-uat: Dispatch UAT for user acceptance testing
sys-ux: Dispatch UX Reviewer for output surface review
po: Dispatch Product Owner for requirements intake
scope: Dispatch Scope agent for impact analysis
sec-eng: Dispatch Security Engineer for security assessment
fe-qa: Dispatch Frontend QA for web quality verification
fe-uat: Dispatch Frontend UAT for Playwright testing
audit: Run full audit pipeline across all domains
mem-save: Save current session state to MEMORY.md
